SSReliabilityClaytonMWD 0.1.0
  • Reference

Kendall's Tau Estimate of Clayton copula parameter

Source: R/fitClayton.R
theta_Ktau_estimate.Rd

Kendall's Tau Estimate of Clayton copula parameter theta

Usage

theta_Ktau_estimate(data)

Arguments

data

A list with two numeric vectors: \(X\) (strength) and \(Y\) (stress).

Value

Moment estimate of \(\theta\) parameter based on the Kendall's \(\tau\).

Examples

set.seed(123)
n <- 50
a1 <- 0.75; b1 <- 1.5; lambda1 <- 0.6
a2 <- 1.2; b2 <- 0.5; lambda2 <- 0.9
theta <- 5 # 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
# data generation
dat <- SSReliabilityClaytonMWD::rMweibull_Clayton(n, a1, b1, lambda1, a2, b2, lambda2, theta)
theta_Ktau_estimate(dat)
#> [1] 4.920904
